source_note: PostgreSQL export filtered to URA-owned LandCare parcels across all available months. Assignments updated through 2026-05-15; survey completion shown through 2026-04-15.
owner_match_note: Owner names are normalized before matching URA and Pittsburgh Land Bank variants.

source_contract.budget_expenses: Not included in this export. Publish contracts, check request, invoice, or NetSuite expense records before rendering dollar metrics.
